eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 11:37 AM ON MAR 27, 2026 Effective until 07:37 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Phoenix Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Phoenix Police Department is looking for Anna Louise Mendoza last seen on foot near South 27th Avenue and West Durango Street, in Phoenix, Arizona. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
